creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
The linked commit (2024-03-12): 

> Fix getting FreeBSD process name
> 
> Looks like it was broken since 25f8ebf9 due to some copy/paste error.

<https://bugs.kde.org/show_bug.cgi?id=480196>

> 480196 – FreeBSD: konsole: broken tabs/session title

– discovered via <https://discuss.kde.org/t/konsole-ascii-characters-misrepresented-as-non-ascii-in-title-bars-and-tabs/11982?u=grahamperrin>

> Konsole: ASCII characters misrepresented as non-ASCII in 
> title bars (and tabs) - Help - KDE Discuss
